textByHashes.210179cad12623a2858541bcf3d0826a289f3e8c: Because you can't. So that's fine.
textByHashes.11651559be9cd91de1f6ca37b46dc9688a7eefab: This is the home of the Mountain Dwarves. How would you like it if I wanted to take a shortcut through your home?
textByHashes.3b788908c092bcf5a2baa16c3b0155e38f85ae32: Well, it is a lot easier to go this way to get past White Wolf Mountain than through those wolf filled passes.
textByHashes.6e6266561be7cfe7c86cfdb73a129b6d2a110e79: Yes, but I don't even know you.
textByHashes.4437591a69f5ef6aa40d36af07f7239d6d1b15d1: I don't make friends easily. People need to earn my trust first.
textByHashes.011c78be0fc328dd47e89129a7bb7d20b4883246: My, we are the persistent one aren't we?
textByHashes.6f91f1705133cf1b821432597ab3c03c0c185aa9: Well, there's a certain gold artefact we're after. We dwarves are big fans of gold! This artefact is the first prize at the Hemenster fishing competition.
textByHashes.ffca775ee025aae5dcef04eff540b87a7b13d1e1: Fortunately we have acquired a pass to enter that competition...
textByHashes.fa69dd7d3d5f53c520909b4d3ffdbd7bdfb4b39e: Unfortunately Dwarves don't make good fishermen.
textByHashes.4380bd672834f49f659f1cba198cf30a6ee80779: Okay. I entrust you with our competition pass. Don't forget to take some gold with you for the entrance fee.
textByHashes.479bcc0339d262e38f814ed713e7c450cc7678d4: Go to Hemenster and do us proud!
textByHashes.0f84433ebe2240b5b3789ede6038a80ba2038791: Go away! You're not going to bully your way in HERE!
textByHashes.41110c66ba1165894de1d5567ebb6c88d74c1698: What if I do! It's no business of yours.
textByHashes.f8c2602cad26f995d4ccbf355f25f5a0b7cc23b8: Well don't give up! Maybe old Jack can give you a few tips.
textByHashes.e8d28b3cdfa7b16e5fc34306353ab2c19213b4ef: Hmmm. It's a good job they sent us spares.
textByHashes.25a580a5321c7f7cd196a931c336d1e6029e741c: There you go. Try not to lose that one.
textByHashes.3c068a55b80d92c8b5e7d2704fd99926fdf31a61: Maybe that's where we are going wrong when we try fishing?
textByHashes.699b913f8b3a34ffbfa1114cc64c3f234443fd44: Maybe we should talk to that old Jack fella near the competition, everyone seemed to be ranting about him.
textByHashes.82440bfdd56644466b49951c3939887e8ce80993: Well done! That's brilliant! Do you have the trophy with you?
textByHashes.7db2ea812c893366a72e9a859b49f28bb79897f6: Oh! It's even more shiny and gold than I thought possible...
textByHashes.7bde6f7175901acbc3483ff9629a29d620e587d2: Welcome, oh great Fishing Champion! Feel free to pop by and use our tunnel any time.
